title: Reconnect or retire Google Drive rclone mount
goal: Repair the expired/revoked gdrive OAuth remote or explicitly retire the Google Drive mount path while preserving the no-restart-loop behavior established during the audit.

acceptance.assertion: rclone-gdrive.service does not enter a rapid restart loop when Google auth is invalid.
If Google Drive remains desired, `rclone config reconnect gdrive:` is completed by the user and a mount smoke proves /home/alex/GDrive is a real rclone mount.
If Google Drive is retired, references to /home/alex/GDrive in active operator paths are either removed or documented as historical.

metadata.live_audit_finding: gdrive OAuth invalid_grant; service stopped and disabled on 2026-07-08.
metadata.outcome: The expired Google Drive rclone mount was reversibly retired. Legacy units, drop-ins and commands are absent, the mount directory is retained but unmounted, rclone.conf and OAuth material are untouched, and the new Restic runtime no longer depends on GDrive.

validated_acceptance.operator-pc-hygiene-v1-t001-1: rclone-gdrive.service and the historical backup service/timer have LoadState=not-found and cannot enter a restart loop.
validated_acceptance.operator-pc-hygiene-v1-t001-2: Not applicable: the reviewed decision selected reversible retirement rather than OAuth reconnection.
validated_acceptance.operator-pc-hygiene-v1-t001-3: No /home/alex/GDrive reference remains in active user systemd sources, ~/.local/bin or the active Restic release; the retained directory is documented as historical and unmounted.

validation: rclone.conf remains owner alex, mode 0600 and SHA-256 84591f4a...; its contents were not read or versioned.
Retired units report LoadState=not-found; retired commands are absent; ~/GDrive exists but is not a mountpoint.
The real Restic backup and exact restore succeeded without GDrive, proving the replacement path is operational.
Retirement backup and receipt remain available for rollback.
metadata.self_review: PASS: retirement receipt, config hash, active unit sources, command absence, mount state, replacement backup path and rollback directory were re-read after the exact-snapshot Restic proof.
